scripts.typecheck: pnpm exec tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && pnpm -r --if-present run typecheck
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @dev-knowledge-hub/shared test && pnpm --filter @dev-knowledge-hub/api test && pnpm --filter @dev-knowledge-hub/web test
scripts.check: pnpm run format:check && pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test && pnpm run build
